title: rinorea boinensis
intro: Rinorea boinensis, also known as Boin's viola, is a species of flowering plant in the family Violaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its use as an anti-inflammatory agent, and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever and rheumatism. Studies have shown that Rinorea boinensis may offer several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Rinorea boinensis are often made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are typically consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
